---
title: " Education censuses and recognition"
subtitle: "The politics of collecting and using data on indigenous students in Latin America "
description: "We analised and compared national regulations as well as data collection documentation and instruments from ten Latin American countries"
toc: false
date: "2024-02-01"
image: educensus.jpg
author: 
  - Daniel Capistrano
  - Christyne Silva
  - Rachel Rabelo
categories:
  - Census
  - Education
  - Latin America
  - Methods
  - State
  - Policy Analysis
  - Official Statistics
doi: 10.4324/9781003259749-5
abstract: ""
---

[Full text](https://doi.org/10.4324/9781003259749-5){.btn .btn-lg .btn-primary}  [Data and Code](){.btn .btn-lg .btn-success} [Citation](./ccr2024.ris){.btn .btn-lg .btn-info}
